personal.name: Jemelito Constantino
personal.title: AI/ML Engineer | Full-Stack Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Architecting and shipping production AI systems and full-stack platforms
personal.description: Senior software engineer with 7+ years building production systems, distributed services, and cloud-native architectures. Deep experience across the full stack — from system design and API architecture to AI integration and deployment.

availability.message: Open to freelance work and collaborations

seo.siteDescription: Portfolio of Jemelito Constantino, a senior AI/ML and full-stack software engineer with 7+ years building production systems, APIs, and cloud-native architectures.

projects.title: TrashLion SaaS Landing Page
projects.description: Responsive, conversion-focused landing page built for a SaaS product with modern UI, clear messaging, and production-ready delivery.
projects.longDescription: Built a polished SaaS landing page focused on clarity, responsiveness, and conversion. The project emphasized clean front-end execution, strong user experience, and reliable communication flows.
features: Responsive design across desktop and mobile
Conversion-oriented layout and calls to action
Clean, modern UI built for performance and clarity

projects.title: Object Detection System
projects.description: AI-powered real-time marine object detection from drone footage using computer vision and YOLO-based models.
projects.longDescription: Developed a real-time detection system for drone footage that identifies and tracks marine objects using computer vision pipelines, model inference, and monitoring workflows.
features: Drone integration for live capture workflows

projects.title: LLM-Powered Education Assistant
projects.description: Intelligent AI assistant integrated into educational workflows using LangChain and OpenAI, supporting students and staff at Surigao Education Center.
projects.longDescription: Architected and shipped a production LLM-powered assistant for an educational institution. The system handles student queries, automates administrative workflows, and provides intelligent support via LangChain agent pipelines on top of OpenAI.
features: LLM agent system with tool use and memory
Prompt evaluation and AI observability setup
Production hardening and model selection strategy

projects.title: Full-Stack SaaS Platform
projects.description: End-to-end SaaS platform built for international clients on goLance, featuring scalable APIs, modern frontend, and cloud deployment.
projects.longDescription: Designed and delivered a full-stack SaaS product from scratch — scalable backend APIs in FastAPI and NestJS, a performant React/Next.js frontend, and deployment on GCP via Docker and Kubernetes with full CI/CD.
features: Scalable microservices backend with REST and GraphQL APIs
Modern frontend with strong UX and accessibility
Cloud deployment on GCP with Docker and Kubernetes

testimonials.name: Sementha Lee
testimonials.content: Jemelito is an exceptional engineer who consistently delivers high-quality production systems. His ownership across the stack and attention to architecture are unmatched.

testimonials.name: Reshmi Patel
testimonials.content: Working with Jemelito was a fantastic experience. He took our ambiguous requirements and turned them into clean, well-tested, and maintainable systems.

testimonials.name: Tilman Schmidt
testimonials.content: Jemelito's ability to own the full stack — from system design through deployment and observability — and deliver on time is truly impressive. A reliable partner for any technical challenge.

experience.title: AI/ML Engineer
experience.description: Architect and ship production AI/ML systems end-to-end, supporting educational programs and operational workflows.
achievements: Design and integrate LLM-powered agents, automation pipelines, and intelligent assistants on OpenAI and LangChain stacks
Own model selection, prompt design, evaluation strategy, and production hardening for AI features
Drive AI adoption across cross-functional teams; establish engineering standards for prompt evaluation, agent tracing, and AI observability

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Architect and deliver full-stack and AI features end-to-end for international clients across SaaS, marketplace, and AI product domains.
achievements: Design scalable backend services and APIs in Python (FastAPI), Node.js (NestJS/Express), and .NET, backed by PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis
Build modern frontend systems in React, Next.js, and TypeScript with strong performance, accessibility, and UX discipline
Integrate LLMs, computer vision, and automation into production product workflows; own deployment on AWS and GCP via Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
Partner with founders and product teams on architecture decisions, technical planning, code review, and delivery roadmaps

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Delivered 30+ end-to-end engagements spanning full-stack web platforms, AI and LLM integration, and workflow automation.
achievements: Owned architecture, implementation, and delivery on greenfield builds and legacy modernization across Next.js, React, FastAPI, Django, and PostgreSQL
Built and shipped production systems with 100% client retention and repeat-engagement rate
Translated ambiguous client requirements into clean, well-tested, maintainable codebases

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Built backend services and frontend features for a travel safety platform within an Agile delivery cycle.
achievements: Implemented REST APIs, relational schema design, and UI components under senior engineer mentorship
Contributed to code reviews, testing, and release processes

education.description: Pursuing a Master of Science degree with a focus on advanced computing and engineering.
Professional program in data analytics, data management, and applied data science.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Studied core computer science concepts including software engineering, algorithms, data structures, and systems design.

services.title: AI/ML Engineering
services.description: Building production AI systems — LLM-powered agents, RAG pipelines, computer vision solutions, and end-to-end ML workflows.

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: Delivering scalable full-stack platforms with FastAPI/NestJS backends, React/Next.js frontends, and cloud-native deployment.

services.title: System Design & Architecture
services.description: Designing distributed systems, microservices architectures, and APIs that scale — with strong observability and reliability.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Setting up GCP/AWS infrastructure, Docker/Kubernetes deployments, and CI/CD pipelines for production-grade reliability.

about: Senior software engineer with 7+ years architecting and shipping production systems and full-stack web platforms. Deep hands-on experience with distributed services, API design, and cloud-native architectures on GCP.

Strong ownership across the entire stack — system design, API architecture, deployment, observability, and code quality. Track record of taking products from prototype to production for international clients and early-stage ventures.
